name: Pacific NW XRay
description: A simple modernized website for Pacific Northwest X-Ray Inc., a medical/radiology equipment, supplies, and accessories retailer in Gresham, Oregon, using only the content from the original pnwx.com site and preserving relevant original assets such as the favicon where applicable.
personaStyleGuide: Build the site as a refined editorial catalog rather than a generic e-commerce grid. The visual anchor is monumental typography paired with precise, clinical whitespace and full-bleed legacy product imagery where original assets exist. Use a crisp serif or high-contrast display face for headlines to give authority, balanced by a highly legible humanist sans for all operational text. Keep the layout cardless by default: long horizontal bands, split compositions, oversized labels, and disciplined alignment lines. Spacing should feel calm and rigorous, with generous margins and strong vertical rhythm to evoke medical precision. Shadows should be minimal to nonexistent; rely on contrast, scale, thin rules, and layered surfaces instead of floating boxes. Use a cool Pacific Northwest-inspired palette: soft clinical whites, foggy blue-grays, deep evergreen accents, and one sharper sterile cyan-blue highlight for navigation, search, and interactive states. Imagery treatment should preserve original site assets, including the favicon, while placing them in cleaner compositions with restrained cropping, subtle duotone overlays only when needed, and no decorative clutter. Motion, if used, should be quiet and purposeful: fade-ins, sectional reveals, and smooth anchor transitions rather than flashy effects.
features: Popular product/category links from the original pnwx.com homepage
Catalog-style presentation using the original site content
Visible business contact information for Pacific Northwest X-Ray Inc. in Gresham, Oregon
Preservation of relevant original assets such as the favicon where applicable

sections.title: Pacific Northwest X-Ray Inc.
sections.description: A commanding opening section built around the original identity and homepage language: "X-Ray - radiology equipment, supplies, parts and accessories!" Preserve relevant original branding assets such as the favicon where applicable.
sections.layoutHint: Full-bleed hero with oversized typography on one side and preserved original brand imagery on the other, using a cardless asymmetrical split with strong negative space.

sections.title: Search for X-Ray Products.
sections.description: A simplified search-led section centered on the original homepage prompt: "Search for X-Ray Products."
sections.layoutHint: Wide horizontal search band embedded into the page architecture, with bold label treatment and minimal chrome rather than a boxed search module.

sections.title: ...Or select from some of our most popular....
sections.description: Present only the original homepage popular links: Fastest Shipping Lead Apparel, Most Comfortable Aprons, Surgical Radiation Reducing Gloves, Line-Pair Resolution Test Phantoms, Lead Glass, System Test Phantoms, Lead Curtains, Resolution Test Tools/Phantoms, X-Ray Merchant Boards, ACR accredited Medium MRI Phantom, Small Animal Immobilizers, Mobile Lead Barriers, X-Ray Table Pads, Silver Recovery Systems, and X-Ray Grids.
sections.layoutHint: Use a flowing editorial index with large text links in staggered columns, avoiding product cards and instead treating the categories like a premium archive navigation wall.

sections.title: This web site is our catalog!
sections.description: Reinforce the original catalog positioning with the exact statement: "This web site is our catalog! No printed catalog is available."
sections.layoutHint: Set this as a typographic statement section with dramatic scale, thin divider lines, and a restrained archival feel rather than a promotional content block.

sections.title: Contact
sections.description: Include the original contact details exactly as shown on the homepage: Pacific Northwest X-Ray Inc. P.O. Box 625, Gresham, OR 97030 U.S.A. 503-667-3000. Toll Free U.S.A: 800-827-9729. Fax : 503-666-8855.
sections.layoutHint: Use a clean full-width footer/contact band with oversized numerals and tightly set address details, preserving the business information as the closing anchor.

branding.aesthetic: A premium medical-industrial editorial aesthetic that modernizes a legacy radiology catalog without losing its original authority or utilitarian clarity.

imagery.style: Preserved legacy site assets and clinical product imagery presented in clean, full-bleed editorial compositions with restrained archival polish.
